title: rhododendron × norbitonense var. aureum
intro: Rhododendron × norbitonense var. aureum, also known as the Norbury yellow rhododendron, is a variety of rhododendron that is primarily cultivated for its vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron × norbitonense var. aureum are thought to include antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, although more research is needed to confirm these findings. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, although the most effective and safe methods of use have not been extensively documented.
